title: Identify the gas-sensitive comment targets in SimpleBondV4
description: Review contracts/SimpleBondV4.sol and confirm which existing paths have non-obvious gas tradeoffs worth documenting, especially batch fee updates, ruling hot paths, and the shared refund loop.

title: Add gas comments to batch updates and ruling hot paths
description: Update SimpleBondV4 comments around setJudgeFees, ruleForChallenger, and ruleForPoster to explain the intended gas-saving patterns such as batching, local caching, and skipping zero-value judge transfers.

title: Document the refund-loop gas tradeoff
description: Expand or refine the SimpleBondV4 comments around _refundRemaining and its callers so the linear gas cost of refunding pending challengers is explicit and tied to rejectBond, concede, claimTimeout, and challenger-win settlement.

title: Verify the change stays documentation-only
description: Review the final diff to ensure the task only adds or adjusts comments in SimpleBondV4, with no ABI, logic, storage-layout, or test-behavior changes.
